title: Make travis build pass
body:
Currently the Mac build fails.

https://travis-ci.org/cliffordwolf/yosys/jobs/290517914

```
/usr/local/Homebrew/Library/Homebrew/brew.rb:12:in `<main>': Homebrew must be run under Ruby 2.3! You're running 2.0.0. (RuntimeError)
The command "if [[ "$TRAVIS_OS_NAME" == "osx" ]]; then brew tap Homebrew/bundle && brew bundle; fi" failed and exited with 1 during .
Your build has been stopped.
/Users/travis/.travis/job_stages: line 166: shell_session_update: command not found
```
code_blocks:
